title: BEM-879 request v1.7
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM879_PROTOCOL_V17_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-879 PROTOCOL V1.7 REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: agree protocol v1.7 after operator review of v1.6.
Base: BEM878 protocol v1.6 and table 9 roadmap.
Operator requirement:
- In roadmap, do not create Worker with minimum one internal contour.
- Calculate optimal number of Worker internal contours from the roadmap tasks.
- Add the calculated contour count to the roadmap and protocol.
External auditor calculation:
- Roadmap table has sequential gates plus two main parallel zones.
- After P0-REG-001, useful parallel tasks are P0-ARCH-001, P0-RULE-001, P0-LOG-001: width 3.
- After P1-DIR-001, useful parallel tasks are P1-DIR-RULE-001, P1-DIR-PLAN-001, P1-WRK-001: width 3.
- Later useful parallelism is 2 or less.
- With 2 contours, the roadmap is slower because one of the three parallel branches waits.
- With 4 contours, the fourth contour is mostly idle and does not reduce the critical path.
- Recommended optimum: 3 Worker internal contours.
Required protocol change:
- P1-WRK-001 becomes: Create Worker object with Curator and 3 internal contours.
- Add contour model: WRK-C1 Registry and architecture contour; WRK-C2 Rules and communication contour; WRK-C3 Implementation and testing contour.
- Testing remains assigned function, not permanent separate testing contour. Curator assigns C3 or another non-authoring contour to testing workspace when needed.
Required Worker output and Curator final response. Status APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
